ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location type (e.g., physical, virtual) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_location_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_type_id") REFERENCES location_types ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the meeting */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the meeting is held */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week the meeting is held */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the meeting */,
  "fellowship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fellowship type (e.g., Narcotics Anonymous, Alcoholics Anonymous) */,
  "meeting_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meeting type (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "meeting_format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meeting format (e.g., in-person, online) */,
  "meeting_purpose_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meeting purpose (e.g., discussion, speaker) */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meeting topic */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the meeting in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES meeting_topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_meeting_purpose_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_purpose_id") REFERENCES meeting_purposes ("meeting_purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_meeting_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_format_id") REFERENCES meeting_formats ("meeting_format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_meeting_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_type_id") REFERENCES meeting_types ("meeting_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_fellowship_id FOREIGN KEY ("fellowship_id") REFERENCES fellowships ("fellowship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fellowships" (
  "fellowship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fellowship type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the fellowship type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fellowship type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fellowship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_types" (
  "meeting_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the meeting type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meeting type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_formats" (
  "meeting_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting format */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the meeting format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meeting format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_purposes" (
  "meeting_purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting purpose */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the meeting purpose */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meeting purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role (e.g., administrator, attendee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting attended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who attended the meeting */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date the meeting was attended */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., present, absent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_attendance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_attendance_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the note is from */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was made */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_status" TEXT /* Status of the note (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_notes_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the update is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_updates_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "map_link" TEXT /* Link to a map of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the notification is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the resource is for */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., handout, video) */,
  "resource_link" TEXT /* Link to the resource */,
  "resource_status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_resources_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)
